info.english_meaning: to go to become weak to lose power of senses to harden
info.hindI_arTa: jAnA kaWina honA indriya kA balaGawa jAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samArCanmAmakA yudDe kaTaM saYjaya SaMsa me BaradvAjaM jiGAMsanto savyasAcivfkodarO' (BA॰droRa॰183.17).. samArCan=samAsAdayan=aBimuKamayuH tAByAM saNgatA aBUvannityarTaH
'vAyunA hIdaM yatamantarikzaM na samfcCati' (E॰brA॰2.41) na samfcCati na pralIyate na SIryata iti zaqguruSizyaBawwaBAskarO yataM badDam yamernizWA
'vajrO ha samfcCeyAtAM tavoha vajrO na samfcCete' (Sa॰brA॰1.2.5.20)
'yaTAlpaDAnye (anasi) pAtrARi samfcCeranneva tasyokTAni samfcCante' (SAM0 brA0 118) samfcCeran saNGawweran samfcCante parasparamAhanyante
'tAByaH sa nirfcCAdyaH naH praTamo'nyonyasmE druhyAt' (tE0 saM0 6221-2) ukto'rTaH
'upa yadDIdaM kiM ca jAyate'syAM tadupajAyate'Ta yannyfcCatyasyAmeva tadupopyate' (Sa0 brA0 2349) nyfcCati nIcErgacCati niKAtaM Bavati
'sa innvE tamapArcCati' (tE0 saM0 1596) upArcCati uparuDya pIqayati
